mapper.select: SELECT s.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, s.user_id AS userId, s.tariff_id AS tariffId, t.tariff_name AS tariffName, t.price AS price, DATE_FORMAT(s.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(s.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, s.subscription_status AS subscriptionStatus FROM subscriptions s INNER JOIN tariffs t ON s.tariff_id = t.tariff_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.subscription_id DESC

SELECT s.subscription_id AS subscriptionId, s.user_id AS userId, s.tariff_id AS tariffId, t.tariff_name AS tariffName, t.price AS price, DATE_FORMAT(s.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(s.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate, s.subscription_status AS subscriptionStatus FROM subscriptions s INNER JOIN tariffs t ON s.tariff_id = t.tariff_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.subscription_status = 'ACTIVE' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN s.start_date AND s.end_date ORDER BY s.subscription_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscriptions ( user_id, tariff_id, start_date, end_date, subscription_status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{tariffId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, 'ACTIVE', NOW() )
